Description: "Replace hardcoded Fatih/Istanbul mosque list with real-time Overpass API (OpenStreetMap) queries. The app now fetches actual mosques within 3km of the user's GPS position, falling back to 5km and 10km radius if fewer than 5 results are found. This ensures the \"Yakındaki Camiler\" feature shows genuinely nearby mosques regardless of the user's location."
Instruction: "Add dart:convert and http imports, replace hardcoded mosque list with Overpass API fetching, and update getUserLocation to trigger the fetch."
